problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: The key to What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? is Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor — specifically Synaptic plasticity modulation — which would help 75,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
